memories.highlight: Home base — Connaught Place all-nighters, IIT Delhi campus life, metro stories at 1am.
First startup pitch at a Lajpat Nagar co-working space. We didn't get funded. Best failure.
Jaisalmer desert camp — sleeping under 10,000 stars with no phone signal for 3 days.
Rode a motorcycle from Jaipur to Pushkar at sunrise. The highway was empty and golden.
December beach trip with college friends. Watched a football match at midnight in a shack bar.
Spiti Valley circuit — Chandratal Lake at 4,300m altitude. Air is thin. Silence is loud.
Solang Valley in winter — first time I saw actual avalanche warnings. Stayed anyway.
Bengaluru for a hackathon. Won second place. The chai at 3am kept us going.
Coorg coffee estate stay — woke up inside clouds every morning. Best coffee of my life.
Alleppey houseboat — drifting through backwaters with a book, masala chai, and zero agenda.
Mumbai for internship. Local train at rush hour is a rite of passage for every Indian.
Varanasi ghat at dawn — watched Ganga Aarti. The oldest city in the world still feels alive.
On the list: Madurai Meenakshi temple + drive down ECR to Pondicherry.
